root_cause_notes: generator alternates phrase lengths but evaluator used coarse early/late note split
phrase boundaries were not explicitly planned or measured
duration thresholding collapsed mixed rhythmic layers into an inflated short/long ratio
no explicit rhythm onset cell model existed in v1
interval proxy relied on adjacent global pitch sequence rather than phrase-aware melodic voice
generator did not target step/leap ratio explicitly
density used a single before/after golden split and missed strongest peak location
generator density scheduling was broad, not tied to planned windows

notes: golden_section_0_618 was within tolerance in v1 but measured by coarse section proxy
repair scope is compliance-focused without adding unrelated generation features
